rationale: The two papers clearly overlap on self-construal (independent vs. interdependent) as a focal construct, and the cited paper provides a mechanism-oriented account (relational processing) that could plausibly inform the citing paper’s theorizing about self-construal effects. However, the matched evidence is only a DOI record (no in-text citation context or quoted reference text), so there is not enough direct evidence to tell whether this is substantive use versus background mention.
